ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb where the property is located */,
  "address_line" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification type of the property (e.g., house, townhouse, unit) */,
  "number_of_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "land_size" REAL /* Land size of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the property is listed */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale outcome */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the sale (e.g., auction sale, private sale) */,
  "auction_date" TEXT /* Date of the auction (if applicable) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent associated with the sale */,
  "web_url" TEXT /* Web URL for additional property details */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_suburb FOREIGN KEY ("suburb") REFERENCES suburbs ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Name of the real estate agency the agent works for */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the agent */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agent record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suburbs" (
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suburb */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the suburb */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the suburb */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the suburb is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the suburb is located */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price of properties in the suburb */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suburb record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suburb record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "property_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the property view */,
  "potential_buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the potential buyer */,
  "potential_buyer_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the potential buyer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who conducted the view */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property view record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property view record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_outcomes" (
  "sales_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales outcome */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales outcome */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the sale (e.g., auction sale, private sale) */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who conducted the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales outcome record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales outcome record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outcomes_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outcomes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "market_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suburb for which the trend is calculated */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date for which the trend is calculated */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price of properties in the suburb on the trend date */,
  "price_growth_rate" REAL /* Price growth rate of properties in the suburb on the trend date */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who calculated the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market trend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market trend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_suburb_id FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_id") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)
